landscape_traits: Ice sheets, glaciers, and treeless frozen plains.
Shorelines, saltwater marshes, and cliffside regions.
Arid regions, whether sandy dunes or eroded rocky wastes.
Any high-density tree cover, from pine taigas to tropical jungles.
Open, flat, or rolling terrain with low vegetation.
High elevation, steep slopes, and rocky peaks.
Wetlands, stagnant water, and boggy earth.
Massive cavern systems and deep-earth environments.
